title: Darama
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:NilSpaarHS-NEGTC.png|thumb|right|180px|[[Nil Spaar]], Darama during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]].]]
The '''Darama''', also known as the '''chosen one''' or '''Blessed''',<ref name="CTD">''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]''</ref> was a status in [[Yevetha]] society. The Darama was a spiritual leader for the whole population and was treated with the greatest respect. Generally, the Darama would also assume the status of [[Viceroy/Legends|Viceroy]] of the [[Duskhan League]].
